case_title: THE WARRIOR ROOSTER LLC, VS. NELLY MARTINE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE WARRIOR ROOSTER LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINE, NELLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 345 JONES STREET, #200 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINE, NELLY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE WARRIOR ROOSTER LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINE, NELLY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE WARRIOR ROOSTER LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED JAN-28-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINE, NELLY
